name: rvv-callable-artifact-bundle
title: RVV callable artifact bundle with ssh rvv correctness evidence
description: Package the existing bounded RVV i32m1 add object route with its declared callable C ABI, then link and run a minimal correctness harness on ssh rvv.
scope: RVV first-slice runtime ABI packaging and real-hardware correctness
creator: codex
notes: Created from Hermes direction brief. Current HEAD dc96794 already exports a bounded RVV i32m1 add RISC-V relocatable object through explicit RVV ops -> EmitC -> MLIR C/C++ emitter -> clang. This task adds the callable ABI surface/bundle and real ssh rvv correctness evidence without restoring descriptor/direct-C/source-export authority.
